description: Product Description Description The product is a package of 30 fancy glitter buttons decorated with a ring of sparkling rhinestones. for decorating weddings, hair bows, doll clothes, cards, scrapbooks, boxes, etc. Features - Color: silver. - Material: alloy and rhinestone. - Fancy shiny slip buckles. - Decorated with a ring of sparkling rhinestones. - Great for decorating weddings, hair bows, doll clothes, cards, scrapbooks, boxes, etc. - Can a touch of elegance to your items. - Shapes will be sent randomly. heart - Size: approx. 20* 19 mm; Length of center rod: approx. 10mm - The circular Outer diameter: approx. 15 mm; Length of center rod: approx. 15mm - A squareOuter diameter: approx. 15 mm; Length of center rod: approx. 15mm Package Including 30* Heart/ round/ square ribbon button slider for DIY Craft Wedding invitations ( silver ) birthday presents or Christmas presents for children.
